posts.text: Pakistani Prime Minister: "My message to the Iranian Supreme Leader is that his country has reached a ceasefire and a memorandum of understanding, and has preserved its dignity." - Al Jazeera
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: Britain’s economy is far weaker for being outside the EU, but its booming AI sector may be a notable exception. Now it must act on its advantage https://www.economist.com/britain/2026/06/17/what-britain-needs-to-do-to-grasp-its-big-opportunities-in-ai?taid=6a3aa8d208ba4b0001f1030b&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: Talk about a turn of events. There is now a 25% chance that the Fed raises interest rates next month, at the July 29th meeting. At the start of 2026, markets had been pricing-in 2 interest rate CUTS by the July meeting. "Higher for longer" is officially back.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
